name: Raspberry Dreams
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Raspberry jam (or substitute other jams such as Blackberry or apricot)
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. In a large mixing bowl, cream together the margarine and sugar until light and fluffy. Add the egg and beat until well mixed. Stir in the flour. Pat the dough into a 13 x 9 inch pan. Spread the jam evenly on top. In a small bowl combine the topping ingredients; carefully spread over the jam. Bake for 25 minutes. Cool. Cut into 2 x 1 inch bars.
